title: Schoenia ramosissima
intro: Schoenia ramosissima, also known as Poverty Weed, is a small shrub native to Australia. This plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, and its health benefits include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, wounds, and skin conditions. The bioactive constituents of Schoenia ramosissima include sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Poverty Weed include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat digestive problems, skin irritations, and minor infections.
